package rulecoverage

func PositiveRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetach() string {
    ruleID := "request_context_passed_to_background_task_without_detach"
    family := "context"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Background goroutines that still appear to inherit request-scoped context instead of detaching with context.WithoutCancel or equivalent."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
